props.ChoiceText: You solved a problem others had tolerated for years, and the solution marked you as more than merely competent.
props.ChoiceBio: Innovation made your name as someone who could improve a craft rather than merely practice it.

0.TransitionText: Because innovation made your name as someone who could improve a craft rather than merely practice it, your life stayed with tools, labor, and the discipline of making things well.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Craftsman, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because innovation made your name as someone who could improve a craft rather than merely practice it, skilled work hardened into authority over other working hands.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Guildmaster, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because innovation made your name as someone who could improve a craft rather than merely practice it, technique and curiosity pulled you beyond ordinary craft into stranger processes.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Alchemist, but you may remain on your current path instead.
